name: Turkey with Sausage Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 5 pounds bone-in turkey, breast side up
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and pat the turkey breast dry.
2. Place the turkey, breast side up, in a shallow baking dish.
3. Brush with butter.
4. Bake uncovered at 325°F for 2 to 2 1/2 hours or until the internal temperature reaches 170°F. If necessary, cover loosely with foil to prevent excess browning.
5. Meanwhile, cook sausage, celery, and onions in a skillet until the sausage is browned and vegetables are tender; drain.
6. Remove from heat; add all remaining ingredients and mix well.
7. Spoon into a greased 3-quart casserole.
8. Cover and bake at 325°F for 1 hour.
9. Serve with sliced turkey.
